15# define CPPLINQ__HEADER_GUARD
16// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
17#include <algorithm>
18#include <cassert>
19#include <climits>
20#include <exception>
21#include <functional>
22#include <iterator>

30#// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
31#ifdef _MSC_VER
32# pragma warning (push)
33# pragma warning (disable:4512) // 'class' : assignment operator could not be generated
34 // Rationale: cpplinq doesn't rely on assignment operators
35# pragma warning (disable:4702) // unreachable code
36 // Rationale: Depending on the predicates and the calling
37 // code the compiler might detect unreacable code that with
38 // other predicates are reachable.
39#endif
40// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
41#ifndef CPPLINQ_ASSERT
42# define CPPLINQ_ASSERT(expr) assert(expr)
43#endif
44#ifndef CPPLINQ_METHOD
45# define CPPLINQ_METHOD
46#endif
47#ifndef CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD
48# define CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD inline
49#endif
50#ifndef CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
51# define CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT throw ()
52#endif

61namespace cpplinq
62{
63 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
64
65 typedef std::size_t size_type;
66
67 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
68
69 struct base_exception : std::exception
70 {
71 virtual const char* what() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
72 {
73 return "base_exception";
74 }
75 };
76
77 struct programming_error_exception : base_exception
78 {
79 virtual const char* what() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
80 {
81 return "programming_error_exception";
82 }
83 };
84
85 struct sequence_empty_exception : base_exception
86 {
87 virtual const char* what() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
88 {
89 return "sequence_empty_exception";
90 }
91 };

94
95 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
96 // Tedious implementation details of cpplinq
97 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
98
99 namespace detail
100 {
101
102 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
103
104 size_type const invalid_size = static_cast<size_type>(-1);
105
106 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
107
108 template<typename TValue>
109 struct cleanup_type
110 {
111 typedef typename std::remove_const<
112 typename std::remove_reference<TValue>::type
113 >::type type;
114 };
115
116 template<typename TRangeBuilder, typename TRange>
117 struct get_builtup_type
118 {
119 static TRangeBuilder get_builder();
120 static TRange get_range();
121
122 typedef decltype (get_builder().build(get_range())) type;
123 };
124
125 template<typename TPredicate, typename TValue>
126 struct get_transformed_type
127 {
128 static TValue get_value();
129 static TPredicate get_predicate();
130
131 typedef decltype (get_predicate()(get_value())) raw_type;
132 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_type>::type type;
133 };
134
135 template<typename TArray>
136 struct get_array_properties;
137
138 template<typename TValue, int Size>
139 struct get_array_properties<TValue[Size]>
140 {
141 enum
142 {
143 size = Size,
144 };
145
146 typedef typename cleanup_type<TValue>::type value_type;
147 typedef value_type const* iterator_type;
148 };
149
150 template<typename TValue>
151 struct opt
152 {
153 typedef TValue value_type;
154
155 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
156 : is_initialized(false)
157 {
158 }
159
160 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit opt(value_type&& value)
161 : is_initialized(true)
162 {
163 new (&storage) value_type(std::move(value));
164 }
165
166 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit opt(value_type const& value)
167 : is_initialized(true)
168 {
169 new (&storage) value_type(value);
170 }
171
172 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ~opt() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
173 {
174 auto ptr = get_ptr();
175 if (ptr)
176 {
177 ptr->~value_type();
178 }
179 is_initialized = false;
180 }
181
182 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt(opt const& v)
183 : is_initialized(v.is_initialized)
184 {
185 if (v.is_initialized)
186 {
187 copy(&storage, &v.storage);
188 }
189 }
190
191 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt(opt&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
192 : is_initialized(v.is_initialized)
193 {
194 if (v.is_initialized)
195 {
196 move(&storage, &v.storage);
197 }
198 v.is_initialized = false;
199 }
200
201 CPPLINQ_METHOD void swap(opt& v)
202 {
203 if (is_initialized && v.is_initialized)
204 {
205 storage_type tmp;
206
207 move(&tmp, &storage);
208 move(&storage, &v.storage);
209 move(&v.storage, &tmp);
210 }
211 else if (is_initialized)
212 {
213 move(&v.storage, &storage);
214 v.is_initialized = true;
215 is_initialized = false;
216 }
217 else if (v.is_initialized)
218 {
219 move(&storage, &v.storage);
220 v.is_initialized = false;
221 is_initialized = true;
222 }
223 else
224 {
225 // Do nothing
226 }
227 }
228
229 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt& operator= (opt const& v)
230 {
231 if (this == std::addressof(v))
232 {
233 return *this;
234 }
235
236 opt<value_type> o(v);
237
238 swap(o);
239
240 return *this;
241 }
242
243 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt& operator= (opt&& v)
244 {
245 if (this == std::addressof(v))
246 {
247 return *this;
248 }
249
250 swap(v);
251
252 return *this;
253 }
254
255 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD opt& operator= (value_type v)
256 {
257 return *this = opt(std::move(v));
258 }
259
260 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD void clear() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
261 {
262 opt empty;
263 swap(empty);
264 }
265
266 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type const* get_ptr() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
267 {
268 if (is_initialized)
269 {
270 return reinterpret_cast<value_type const*> (&storage);
271 }
272 else
273 {
274 return nullptr;
275 }
276 }
277
278 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type* get_ptr() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
279 {
280 if (is_initialized)
281 {
282 return reinterpret_cast<value_type*> (&storage);
283 }
284 else
285 {
286 return nullptr;
287 }
288 }
289
290 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type const& get() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
291 {
292 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(is_initialized);
293 return *get_ptr();
294 }
295
296 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type& get() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
297 {
298 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(is_initialized);
299 return *get_ptr();
300 }
301
302 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool has_value() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
303 {
304 return is_initialized;
305 }
306
307 // TODO: To be replaced with explicit operator bool ()
308 typedef bool (opt::* type_safe_bool_type) () const;
309
310 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD operator type_safe_bool_type () const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
311 {
312 return is_initialized ? &opt::has_value : nullptr;
313 }
314
315 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type const& operator* () const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
316 {
317 return get();
318 }
319
320 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type& operator* () CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
321 {
322 return get();
323 }
324
325 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type const* operator-> () const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
326 {
327 return get_ptr();
328 }
329
330 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type* operator-> () CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
331 {
332 return get_ptr();
333 }
334
335 private:
336 typedef typename std::aligned_storage<
337 sizeof(value_type)
338 , std::alignment_of<value_type>::value
339 >::type storage_type;
340
341 storage_type storage;
342 bool is_initialized;
343
344 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD static void move(
345 storage_type* to
346 , storage_type* from
347 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
348 {
349 auto f = reinterpret_cast<value_type*> (from);
350 new (to) value_type(std::move(*f));
351 f->~value_type();
352 }
353
354 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD static void copy(
355 storage_type* to
356 , storage_type const* from
357 )
358 {
359 auto f = reinterpret_cast<value_type const*> (from);
360 new (to) value_type(*f);
361 }
362
363
364 };
365
366 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
367 // The generic interface
368 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
369 // _range classes:
370 // inherit base_range
371 // COPYABLE
372 // MOVEABLE (movesemantics)
373 // typedef ... this_type ;
374 // typedef ... value_type ;
375 // typedef ... return_type ; // value_type | value_type const &
376 // enum { returns_reference = 0|1 };
377 // return_type front () const
378 // bool next ()
379 // template<typename TRangeBuilder>
380 // typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
381 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
382 // _builder classes:
383 // inherit base_builder
384 // COPYABLE
385 // MOVEABLE (movesemantics)
386 // typedef ... this_type ;
387 // template<typename TRange>
388 // TAggregated build (TRange range) const
389 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
390
391 struct base_range
392 {
393#ifdef CPPLINQ_DETECT_INVALID_METHODS
394 protected:
395 // In order to prevent object slicing
396
397 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_range() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
398 {
399 }
400
401 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_range(base_range const&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
402 {
403 }
404
405 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_range(base_range&&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
406 {
407 }
408
409 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ~base_range() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
410 {
411 }
412
413 private:
414 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_range& operator= (base_range const&);
415 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_range& operator= (base_range&&);
416#endif
417 };
418
419 struct base_builder
420 {
421#ifdef CPPLINQ_DETECT_INVALID_METHODS
422 protected:
423 // In order to prevent object slicing
424
425 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
426 {
427 }
428
429 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_builder(base_builder const&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
430 {
431 }
432
433 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_builder(base_builder&&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
434 {
435 }
436
437 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ~base_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
438 {
439 }
440
441 private:
442 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_builder& operator= (base_builder const&);
443 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD base_builder& operator= (base_builder&&);
444#endif
445 };
446
447 template<typename TValueIterator>
448 struct from_range : base_range
449 {
450 static TValueIterator get_iterator();
451
452 typedef from_range<TValueIterator> this_type;
453 typedef TValueIterator iterator_type;
454
455 typedef decltype (*get_iterator()) raw_value_type;
456 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_value_type>::type value_type;
457 typedef value_type const& return_type;
458 enum
459 {
460 returns_reference = 1,
461 };
462
463 iterator_type current;
464 iterator_type upcoming;
465 iterator_type end;
466
467
468 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_range(
469 iterator_type begin
470 , iterator_type end
471 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
472 : current(std::move(begin))
473 , upcoming(current)
474 , end(std::move(end))
475 {
476 }
477
478 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_range(from_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
479 : current(v.current)
480 , upcoming(v.upcoming)
481 , end(v.end)
482 {
483 }
484
485 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_range(from_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
486 : current(std::move(v.current))
487 , upcoming(std::move(v.upcoming))
488 , end(std::move(v.end))
489 {
490 }
491
492 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
493 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
494 {
495 return range_builder.build(*this);
496 }
497
498 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
499 {
500 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current != upcoming);
501 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current != end);
502
503 return *current;
504 }
505
506 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
507 {
508 if (upcoming == end)
509 {
510 return false;
511 }
512
513 current = upcoming;
514 ++upcoming;
515 return true;
516 }
517 };
518
519 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
520
521 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
522
523 template<typename TContainer>
524 struct from_copy_range : base_range
525 {
526 typedef from_copy_range<TContainer> this_type;
527
528 typedef TContainer container_type;
529 typedef typename TContainer::const_iterator iterator_type;
530 typedef typename TContainer::value_type value_type;
531 typedef value_type const& return_type;
532 enum
533 {
534 returns_reference = 1,
535 };
536
537 container_type container;
538
539 iterator_type current;
540 iterator_type upcoming;
541 iterator_type end;
542
543 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_copy_range(
544 container_type&& container
545 )
546 : container(std::move(container))
547 , current(container.begin())
548 , upcoming(container.begin())
549 , end(container.end())
550 {
551 }
552
553 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_copy_range(
554 container_type const& container
555 )
556 : container(container)
557 , current(container.begin())
558 , upcoming(container.begin())
559 , end(container.end())
560 {
561 }
562
563 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_copy_range(from_copy_range const& v)
564 : container(v.container)
565 , current(v.current)
566 , upcoming(v.upcoming)
567 , end(v.end)
568 {
569 }
570
571 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_copy_range(from_copy_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
572 : container(std::move(v.container))
573 , current(std::move(v.current))
574 , upcoming(std::move(v.upcoming))
575 , end(std::move(v.end))
576 {
577 }
578
579 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
580 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
581 {
582 return range_builder.build(*this);
583 }
584
585 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
586 {
587 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current != upcoming);
588 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current != end);
589
590 return *current;
591 }
592
593 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
594 {
595 if (upcoming == end)
596 {
597 return false;
598 }
599
600 current = upcoming;
601 ++upcoming;
602 return true;
603 }
604 };
605
606 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
607
608 struct int_range : base_range
609 {
610 typedef int_range this_type;
611 typedef int value_type;
612 typedef int return_type;
613 enum
614 {
615 returns_reference = 0,
616 };
617
618 int current;
619 int end;
620
621 static int get_current(int begin, int end)
622 {
623 return (begin < end ? begin : end) - 1; // -1 in order to start one-step before the first element
624 }
625
626 static int get_end(int begin, int end) // -1 in order to avoid an extra test in next
627 {
628 return (begin < end ? end : begin) - 1;
629 }
630
631 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD int_range(
632 int begin
633 , int end
634 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
635 : current(get_current(begin, end))
636 , end(get_end(begin, end))
637 {
638 }
639
640 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD int_range(int_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
641 : current(v.current)
642 , end(v.end)
643 {
644 }
645
646 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD int_range(int_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
647 : current(std::move(v.current))
648 , end(std::move(v.end))
649 {
650 }
651
652 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
653 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
654 {
655 return range_builder.build(*this);
656 }
657
658 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
659 {
660 return current;
661 }
662
663 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
664 {
665 if (current >= end)
666 {
667 return false;
668 }
669
670 ++current;
671
672 return true;
673 }
674 };
675
676 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
677
678 template <typename TValue>
679 struct repeat_range : base_range
680 {
681 typedef repeat_range<TValue> this_type;
682 typedef TValue value_type;
683 typedef TValue return_type;
684 enum
685 {
686 returns_reference = 0,
687 };
688
689 TValue value;
690 size_type remaining;
691
692 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD repeat_range(
693 value_type element
694 , size_type count
695 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
696 : value(std::move(element))
697 , remaining(count)
698 {
699 }
700
701 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD repeat_range(repeat_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
702 : value(v.value)
703 , remaining(v.remaining)
704 {
705 }
706
707 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD repeat_range(repeat_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
708 : value(std::move(v.value))
709 , remaining(std::move(v.remaining))
710 {
711 }
712
713 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
714 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
715 {
716 return range_builder.build(*this);
717 }
718
719 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
720 {
721 return value;
722 }
723
724 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
725 {
726 if (remaining == 0U)
727 {
728 return false;
729 }
730
731 --remaining;
732
733 return true;
734 }
735 };
736
737 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
738
739 template <typename TValue>
740 struct empty_range : base_range
741 {
742 typedef empty_range<TValue> this_type;
743 typedef TValue value_type;
744 typedef TValue return_type;
745 enum
746 {
747 returns_reference = 0,
748 };
749
750 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD empty_range() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
751 {
752 }
753
754 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD empty_range(empty_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
755 {
756 }
757
758 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD empty_range(empty_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
759 {
760 }
761
762 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
763 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
764 {
765 return range_builder.build(*this);
766 }
767
768 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
769 {
770 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(false);
771 throw programming_error_exception();
772 }
773
774 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
775 {
776 return false;
777 }
778 };
779
780 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
781
782 template <typename TValue>
783 struct singleton_range : base_range
784 {
785 typedef singleton_range<TValue> this_type;
786 typedef TValue value_type;
787 typedef TValue const& return_type;
788
789 enum
790 {
791 returns_reference = 1,
792 };
793
794 value_type value;
795 bool done;
796
797 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD singleton_range(TValue const& value)
798 : value(value)
799 , done(false)
800 {
801 }
802
803 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD singleton_range(TValue&& value) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
804 : value(std::move(value))
805 , done(false)
806 {
807 }
808
809 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD singleton_range(singleton_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
810 : value(v.value)
811 , done(v.done)
812 {
813 }
814
815 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD singleton_range(singleton_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
816 : value(std::move(v.value))
817 , done(std::move(v.done))
818 {
819 }
820
821 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
822 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
823 {
824 return range_builder.build(*this);
825 }
826
827 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
828 {
829 return value;
830 }
831
832 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
833 {
834 auto d = done;
835 done = true;
836 return !d;
837 }
838 };
839
840 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
841
842 struct sorting_range : base_range
843 {
844#ifdef CPPLINQ_DETECT_INVALID_METHODS
845 protected:
846 // In order to prevent object slicing
847
848 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sorting_range() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
849 {
850 }
851
852 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sorting_range(sorting_range const&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
853 {
854 }
855
856 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sorting_range(sorting_range&&) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
857 {
858 }
859
860 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ~sorting_range() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
861 {
862 }
863 private:
864 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sorting_range& operator= (sorting_range const&);
865 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sorting_range& operator= (sorting_range&&);
866#endif
867 };
868
869 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
870 struct orderby_range : sorting_range
871 {
872
873 typedef orderby_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
874 typedef TRange range_type;
875 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
876
877 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
878 typedef typename TRange::return_type forwarding_return_type;
879 typedef value_type const& return_type;
880 enum
881 {
882 forward_returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
883 returns_reference = 1,
884 };
885
886 range_type range;
887 predicate_type predicate;
888 bool sort_ascending;
889
890 size_type current;
891 std::vector<value_type> sorted_values;
892
893 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_range(
894 range_type range
895 , predicate_type predicate
896 , bool sort_ascending
897 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
898 : range(std::move(range))
899 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
900 , sort_ascending(sort_ascending)
901 , current(invalid_size)
902 {
903 static_assert (
904 !std::is_convertible<range_type, sorting_range>::value
905 , "orderby may not follow orderby or thenby"
906 );
907 }
908
909 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_range(orderby_range const& v)
910 : range(v.range)
911 , predicate(v.predicate)
912 , sort_ascending(v.sort_ascending)
913 , current(v.current)
914 , sorted_values(v.sorted_values)
915 {
916 }
917
918 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_range(orderby_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
919 : range(std::move(v.range))
920 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
921 , sort_ascending(std::move(v.sort_ascending))
922 , current(std::move(v.current))
923 , sorted_values(std::move(v.sorted_values))
924 {
925 }
926
927 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD forwarding_return_type forwarding_front() const
928 {
929 return range.front();
930 }
931
932 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool forwarding_next()
933 {
934 return range.next();
935 }
936
937 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool compare_values(value_type const& l, value_type const& r) const
938 {
939 if (sort_ascending)
940 {
941 return predicate(l) < predicate(r);
942 }
943 else
944 {
945 return predicate(r) < predicate(l);
946 }
947 }
948
949 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
950 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
951 {
952 return range_builder.build(*this);
953 }
954
955 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
956 {
957 return sorted_values[current];
958 }
959
960 CPPLINQ_METHOD bool next()
961 {
962 if (current == invalid_size)
963 {
964 sorted_values.clear();
965
966 while (range.next())
967 {
968 sorted_values.push_back(range.front());
969 }
970
971 if (sorted_values.size() == 0)
972 {
973 return false;
974 }
975
976 std::sort(
977 sorted_values.begin()
978 , sorted_values.end()
979 , [this](value_type const& l, value_type const& r)
980 {
981 return this->compare_values(l, r);
982 }
983 );
984
985 current = 0U;
986 return true;
987 }
988
989 if (current < sorted_values.size())
990 {
991 ++current;
992 }
993
994 return current < sorted_values.size();
995 }
996 };
997
998 template<typename TPredicate>
999 struct orderby_builder : base_builder
1000 {
1001 typedef orderby_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
1002 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1003
1004 predicate_type predicate;
1005 bool sort_ascending;
1006
1007 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit orderby_builder(predicate_type predicate, bool sort_ascending) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1008 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
1009 , sort_ascending(sort_ascending)
1010 {
1011 }
1012
1013 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_builder(orderby_builder const& v)
1014 : predicate(v.predicate)
1015 , sort_ascending(v.sort_ascending)
1016 {
1017 }
1018
1019 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_builder(orderby_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1020 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1021 , sort_ascending(std::move(v.sort_ascending))
1022 {
1023 }
1024
1025 template<typename TRange>
1026 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD orderby_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
1027 {
1028 return orderby_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate, sort_ascending);
1029 }
1030
1031 };
1032
1033 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1034
1035 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
1036 struct thenby_range : sorting_range
1037 {
1038 typedef thenby_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
1039 typedef TRange range_type;
1040 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1041
1042 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1043 typedef typename TRange::forwarding_return_type forwarding_return_type;
1044 typedef value_type const& return_type;
1045 enum
1046 {
1047 forward_returns_reference = TRange::forward_returns_reference,
1048 returns_reference = 1,
1049 };
1050
1051 range_type range;
1052 predicate_type predicate;
1053 bool sort_ascending;
1054
1055 size_type current;
1056 std::vector<value_type> sorted_values;
1057
1058 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_range(
1059 range_type range
1060 , predicate_type predicate
1061 , bool sort_ascending
1062 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1063 : range(std::move(range))
1064 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
1065 , sort_ascending(sort_ascending)
1066 , current(invalid_size)
1067 {
1068 static_assert (
1069 std::is_convertible<range_type, sorting_range>::value
1070 , "thenby may only follow orderby or thenby"
1071 );
1072 }
1073
1074 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_range(thenby_range const& v)
1075 : range(v.range)
1076 , predicate(v.predicate)
1077 , sort_ascending(v.sort_ascending)
1078 , current(v.current)
1079 , sorted_values(v.sorted_values)
1080 {
1081 }
1082
1083 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_range(thenby_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1084 : range(std::move(v.range))
1085 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1086 , sort_ascending(std::move(v.sort_ascending))
1087 , current(std::move(v.current))
1088 , sorted_values(std::move(v.sorted_values))
1089 {
1090 }
1091
1092 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1093 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1094 {
1095 return range_builder.build(*this);
1096 }
1097
1098 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD forwarding_return_type forwarding_front() const
1099 {
1100 return range.front();
1101 }
1102
1103 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool forwarding_next()
1104 {
1105 return range.next();
1106 }
1107
1108 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool compare_values(value_type const& l, value_type const& r) const
1109 {
1110 auto pless = range.compare_values(l, r);
1111 if (pless)
1112 {
1113 return true;
1114 }
1115
1116 auto pgreater = range.compare_values(r, l);
1117 if (pgreater)
1118 {
1119 return false;
1120 }
1121
1122 if (sort_ascending)
1123 {
1124 return predicate(l) < predicate(r);
1125 }
1126 else
1127 {
1128 return predicate(r) < predicate(l);
1129 }
1130 }
1131
1132 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1133 {
1134 return sorted_values[current];
1135 }
1136
1137 CPPLINQ_METHOD bool next()
1138 {
1139 if (current == invalid_size)
1140 {
1141 sorted_values.clear();
1142
1143 while (range.forwarding_next())
1144 {
1145 sorted_values.push_back(range.forwarding_front());
1146 }
1147
1148 if (sorted_values.size() == 0)
1149 {
1150 return false;
1151 }
1152
1153 std::sort(
1154 sorted_values.begin()
1155 , sorted_values.end()
1156 , [this](value_type const& l, value_type const& r)
1157 {
1158 return this->compare_values(l, r);
1159 }
1160 );
1161
1162 current = 0U;
1163 return true;
1164 }
1165
1166 if (current < sorted_values.size())
1167 {
1168 ++current;
1169 }
1170
1171 return current < sorted_values.size();
1172 }
1173 };
1174
1175 template<typename TPredicate>
1176 struct thenby_builder : base_builder
1177 {
1178 typedef thenby_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
1179 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1180
1181 predicate_type predicate;
1182 bool sort_ascending;
1183
1184 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit thenby_builder(predicate_type predicate, bool sort_ascending) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1185 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
1186 , sort_ascending(sort_ascending)
1187 {
1188 }
1189
1190 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_builder(thenby_builder const& v)
1191 : predicate(v.predicate)
1192 , sort_ascending(v.sort_ascending)
1193 {
1194 }
1195
1196 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_builder(thenby_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1197 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1198 , sort_ascending(std::move(v.sort_ascending))
1199 {
1200 }
1201
1202 template<typename TRange>
1203 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD thenby_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
1204 {
1205 return thenby_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate, sort_ascending);
1206 }
1207
1208 };
1209
1210 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1211
1212 template<typename TRange>
1213 struct reverse_range : base_range
1214 {
1215 typedef reverse_range<TRange> this_type;
1216 typedef TRange range_type;
1217
1218 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1219 typedef value_type const& return_type;
1220
1221 typedef std::vector<value_type> stack_type;
1222
1223 enum
1224 {
1225 returns_reference = 1,
1226 };
1227
1228
1229 range_type range;
1230 size_type capacity;
1231 std::vector<value_type> reversed;
1232 bool start;
1233
1234 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_range(
1235 range_type range
1236 , size_type capacity
1237 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1238 : range(std::move(range))
1239 , capacity(capacity)
1240 , start(true)
1241 {
1242 }
1243
1244 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_range(reverse_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1245 : range(v.range)
1246 , capacity(v.capacity)
1247 , reversed(v.reversed)
1248 , start(v.start)
1249 {
1250 }
1251
1252 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_range(reverse_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1253 : range(std::move(v.range))
1254 , capacity(std::move(v.capacity))
1255 , reversed(std::move(v.reversed))
1256 , start(std::move(v.start))
1257 {
1258 }
1259
1260 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1261 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1262 {
1263 return range_builder.build(*this);
1264 }
1265
1266 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1267 {
1268 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(!start);
1269 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(!reversed.empty());
1270 return reversed[reversed.size() - 1];
1271 }
1272
1273 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1274 {
1275 if (start)
1276 {
1277 start = false;
1278
1279 reversed.clear();
1280 reversed.reserve(capacity);
1281
1282 while (range.next())
1283 {
1284 reversed.push_back(range.front());
1285 }
1286
1287 return !reversed.empty();
1288 }
1289
1290 if (reversed.empty())
1291 {
1292 return false;
1293 }
1294
1295 reversed.pop_back();
1296
1297 return !reversed.empty();
1298 }
1299 };
1300
1301 struct reverse_builder : base_builder
1302 {
1303 typedef reverse_builder this_type;
1304
1305 size_type capacity;
1306
1307 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_builder(size_type capacity) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1308 : capacity(capacity)
1309 {
1310 }
1311
1312 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_builder(reverse_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1313 : capacity(v.capacity)
1314 {
1315 }
1316
1317 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_builder(reverse_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1318 : capacity(std::move(v.capacity))
1319 {
1320 }
1321
1322 template<typename TRange>
1323 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD reverse_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
1324 {
1325 return reverse_range<TRange>(std::move(range), capacity);
1326 }
1327 };
1328
1329 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1330
1331 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
1332 struct where_range : base_range
1333 {
1334 typedef where_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
1335 typedef TRange range_type;
1336 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1337
1338 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1339 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
1340 enum
1341 {
1342 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
1343 };
1344
1345 range_type range;
1346 predicate_type predicate;
1347
1348 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_range(
1349 range_type range
1350 , predicate_type predicate
1351 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1352 : range(std::move(range))
1353 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
1354 {
1355 }
1356
1357 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_range(where_range const& v)
1358 : range(v.range)
1359 , predicate(v.predicate)
1360 {
1361 }
1362
1363 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_range(where_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1364 : range(std::move(v.range))
1365 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1366 {
1367 }
1368
1369 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1370 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1371 {
1372 return range_builder.build(*this);
1373 }
1374
1375 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1376 {
1377 return range.front();
1378 }
1379
1380 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1381 {
1382 while (range.next())
1383 {
1384 if (predicate(range.front()))
1385 {
1386 return true;
1387 }
1388 }
1389
1390 return false;
1391 }
1392 };
1393
1394 template<typename TPredicate>
1395 struct where_builder : base_builder
1396 {
1397 typedef where_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
1398 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1399
1400 predicate_type predicate;
1401
1402 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit where_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1403 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
1404 {
1405 }
1406
1407 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_builder(where_builder const& v)
1408 : predicate(v.predicate)
1409 {
1410 }
1411
1412 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_builder(where_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1413 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1414 {
1415 }
1416
1417 template<typename TRange>
1418 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD where_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
1419 {
1420 return where_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate);
1421 }
1422
1423 };
