1427 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1428
1429 template<typename TRange>
1430 struct take_range : base_range
1431 {
1432 typedef take_range<TRange> this_type;
1433 typedef TRange range_type;
1434
1435 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1436 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
1437 enum
1438 {
1439 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
1440 };
1441
1442 range_type range;
1443 size_type count;
1444 size_type current;
1445
1446
1447 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_range(
1448 range_type range
1449 , size_type count
1450 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1451 : range(std::move(range))
1452 , count(std::move(count))
1453 , current(0)
1454 {
1455 }
1456
1457 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_range(take_range const& v)
1458 : range(v.range)
1459 , count(v.count)
1460 , current(v.current)
1461 {
1462 }
1463
1464 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_range(take_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1465 : range(std::move(v.range))
1466 , count(std::move(v.count))
1467 , current(std::move(v.current))
1468 {
1469 }
1470
1471 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1472 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1473 {
1474 return range_builder.build(*this);
1475 }
1476
1477 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1478 {
1479 return range.front();
1480 }
1481
1482 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1483 {
1484 if (current >= count)
1485 {
1486 return false;
1487 }
1488
1489 ++current;
1490 return range.next();
1491 }
1492 };
1493
1494 struct take_builder : base_builder
1495 {
1496 typedef take_builder this_type;
1497
1498 size_type count;
1499
1500 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit take_builder(size_type count) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1501 : count(std::move(count))
1502 {
1503 }
1504
1505 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_builder(take_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1506 : count(v.count)
1507 {
1508 }
1509
1510 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_builder(take_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1511 : count(std::move(v.count))
1512 {
1513 }
1514
1515 template<typename TRange>
1516 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
1517 {
1518 return take_range<TRange>(std::move(range), count);
1519 }
1520
1521 };
1522
1523 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1524
1525 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
1526 struct take_while_range : base_range
1527 {
1528 typedef take_while_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
1529 typedef TRange range_type;
1530 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1531
1532 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1533 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
1534 enum
1535 {
1536 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
1537 };
1538
1539 range_type range;
1540 predicate_type predicate;
1541 bool done;
1542
1543
1544 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_range(
1545 range_type range
1546 , predicate_type predicate
1547 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1548 : range(std::move(range))
1549 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
1550 , done(false)
1551 {
1552 }
1553
1554 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_range(take_while_range const& v)
1555 : range(v.range)
1556 , predicate(v.predicate)
1557 , done(v.done)
1558 {
1559 }
1560
1561 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_range(take_while_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1562 : range(std::move(v.range))
1563 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1564 , done(std::move(v.done))
1565 {
1566 }
1567
1568 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1569 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1570 {
1571 return range_builder.build(*this);
1572 }
1573
1574 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1575 {
1576 return range.front();
1577 }
1578
1579 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1580 {
1581 if (done)
1582 {
1583 return false;
1584 }
1585
1586 if (!range.next())
1587 {
1588 done = true;
1589 return false;
1590 }
1591
1592 if (!predicate(range.front()))
1593 {
1594 done = true;
1595 return false;
1596 }
1597
1598 return true;
1599 }
1600 };
1601
1602 template<typename TPredicate>
1603 struct take_while_builder : base_builder
1604 {
1605 typedef take_while_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
1606 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1607
1608 predicate_type predicate;
1609
1610 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1611 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
1612 {
1613 }
1614
1615 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_builder(take_while_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1616 : predicate(v.predicate)
1617 {
1618 }
1619
1620 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_builder(take_while_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1621 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1622 {
1623 }
1624
1625 template<typename TRange>
1626 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD take_while_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
1627 {
1628 return take_while_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate);
1629 }
1630
1631 };
1632
1633 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1634
1635 template<typename TRange>
1636 struct skip_range : base_range
1637 {
1638 typedef skip_range<TRange> this_type;
1639 typedef TRange range_type;
1640
1641 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1642 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
1643 enum
1644 {
1645 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
1646 };
1647
1648 range_type range;
1649 size_type count;
1650 size_type current;
1651
1652 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_range(
1653 range_type range
1654 , size_type count
1655 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1656 : range(std::move(range))
1657 , count(std::move(count))
1658 , current(0)
1659 {
1660 }
1661
1662 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_range(skip_range const& v)
1663 : range(v.range)
1664 , count(v.count)
1665 , current(v.current)
1666 {
1667 }
1668
1669 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_range(skip_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1670 : range(std::move(v.range))
1671 , count(std::move(v.count))
1672 , current(std::move(v.current))
1673 {
1674 }
1675
1676 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1677 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1678 {
1679 return range_builder.build(*this);
1680 }
1681
1682 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1683 {
1684 return range.front();
1685 }
1686
1687 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1688 {
1689 if (current == invalid_size)
1690 {
1691 return false;
1692 }
1693
1694 while (current < count && range.next())
1695 {
1696 ++current;
1697 }
1698
1699 if (current < count)
1700 {
1701 current = invalid_size;
1702 return false;
1703 }
1704
1705 return range.next();
1706 }
1707 };
1708
1709 struct skip_builder : base_builder
1710 {
1711 typedef skip_builder this_type;
1712
1713 size_type count;
1714
1715 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit skip_builder(size_type count) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1716 : count(std::move(count))
1717 {
1718 }
1719
1720 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_builder(skip_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1721 : count(v.count)
1722 {
1723 }
1724
1725 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_builder(skip_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1726 : count(std::move(v.count))
1727 {
1728 }
1729
1730 template<typename TRange>
1731 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
1732 {
1733 return skip_range<TRange>(std::move(range), count);
1734 }
1735
1736 };
1737
1738 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1739
1740 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
1741 struct skip_while_range : base_range
1742 {
1743 typedef skip_while_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
1744 typedef TRange range_type;
1745 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1746
1747 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
1748 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
1749 enum
1750 {
1751 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
1752 };
1753
1754 range_type range;
1755 predicate_type predicate;
1756 bool skipping;
1757
1758 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_range(
1759 range_type range
1760 , predicate_type predicate
1761 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1762 : range(std::move(range))
1763 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
1764 , skipping(true)
1765 {
1766 }
1767
1768 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_range(skip_while_range const& v)
1769 : range(v.range)
1770 , predicate(v.predicate)
1771 , skipping(v.skipping)
1772 {
1773 }
1774
1775 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_range(skip_while_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1776 : range(std::move(v.range))
1777 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1778 , skipping(std::move(v.skipping))
1779 {
1780 }
1781
1782 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1783 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1784 {
1785 return range_builder.build(*this);
1786 }
1787
1788 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1789 {
1790 return range.front();
1791 }
1792
1793 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1794 {
1795 if (!skipping)
1796 {
1797 return range.next();
1798 }
1799
1800 while (range.next())
1801 {
1802 if (!predicate(range.front()))
1803 {
1804 skipping = false;
1805 return true;
1806 }
1807 }
1808
1809 return false;
1810 }
1811 };
1812
1813 template <typename TPredicate>
1814 struct skip_while_builder : base_builder
1815 {
1816 typedef skip_while_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
1817 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1818
1819 predicate_type predicate;
1820
1821 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1822 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
1823 {
1824 }
1825
1826 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_builder(skip_while_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1827 : predicate(v.predicate)
1828 {
1829 }
1830
1831 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_builder(skip_while_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1832 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1833 {
1834 }
1835
1836 template<typename TRange>
1837 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD skip_while_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
1838 {
1839 return skip_while_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate);
1840 }
1841
1842 };
1843
1844 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1845
1846 template<typename TRange>
1847 struct ref_range : base_range
1848 {
1849 typedef std::reference_wrapper<
1850 typename TRange::value_type const> value_type;
1851 typedef value_type return_type;
1852 enum
1853 {
1854 returns_reference = 0,
1855 };
1856
1857 typedef ref_range<TRange> this_type;
1858 typedef TRange range_type;
1859
1860 range_type range;
1861
1862 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_range(
1863 range_type range
1864 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1865 : range(std::move(range))
1866 {
1867 static_assert (
1868 TRange::returns_reference
1869 , "ref may only follow a range that returns references"
1870 );
1871 }
1872
1873 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_range(ref_range const& v)
1874 : range(v.range)
1875 {
1876 }
1877
1878 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_range(ref_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1879 : range(std::move(v.range))
1880 {
1881 }
1882
1883 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1884 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1885 {
1886 return range_builder.build(*this);
1887 }
1888
1889 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1890 {
1891 return value_type(range.front());
1892 }
1893
1894 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1895 {
1896 return range.next();
1897 }
1898 };
1899
1900 struct ref_builder : base_builder
1901 {
1902 typedef ref_builder this_type;
1903
1904 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1905 {
1906 }
1907
1908 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_builder(ref_builder const& v)
1909 {
1910 }
1911
1912 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_builder(ref_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1913 {
1914 }
1915
1916 template<typename TRange>
1917 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD ref_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
1918 {
1919 return ref_range<TRange>(std::move(range));
1920 }
1921
1922 };
1923
1924 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1925
1926 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1927
1928 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
1929 struct select_range : base_range
1930 {
1931 static typename TRange::value_type get_source();
1932 static TPredicate get_predicate();
1933
1934
1935 typedef decltype (get_predicate()(get_source())) raw_value_type;
1936 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_value_type>::type value_type;
1937 typedef value_type const& return_type;
1938 enum
1939 {
1940 returns_reference = 1,
1941 };
1942
1943 typedef select_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
1944 typedef TRange range_type;
1945 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
1946
1947 range_type range;
1948 predicate_type predicate;
1949
1950 opt<value_type> cache_value;
1951
1952 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_range(
1953 range_type range
1954 , predicate_type predicate
1955 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1956 : range(std::move(range))
1957 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
1958 {
1959 }
1960
1961 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_range(select_range const& v)
1962 : range(v.range)
1963 , predicate(v.predicate)
1964 , cache_value(v.cache_value)
1965 {
1966 }
1967
1968 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_range(select_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
1969 : range(std::move(v.range))
1970 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
1971 , cache_value(std::move(v.cache_value))
1972 {
1973 }
1974
1975 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
1976 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
1977 {
1978 return range_builder.build(*this);
1979 }
1980
1981 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
1982 {
1983 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(cache_value);
1984 return *cache_value;
1985 }
1986
1987 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
1988 {
1989 if (range.next())
1990 {
1991 cache_value = predicate(range.front());
1992 return true;
1993 }
1994
1995 cache_value.clear();
1996
1997 return false;
1998 }
1999 };
2000
2001 template<typename TPredicate>
2002 struct select_builder : base_builder
2003 {
2004 typedef select_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
2005 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
2006
2007 predicate_type predicate;
2008
2009 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit select_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2010 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
2011 {
2012 }
2013
2014 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_builder(select_builder const& v)
2015 : predicate(v.predicate)
2016 {
2017 }
2018
2019 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_builder(select_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2020 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
2021 {
2022 }
2023
2024 template<typename TRange>
2025 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
2026 {
2027 return select_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate);
2028 }
2029
2030 };
2031
2032 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2033
2034 // Some trickery in order to force the code to compile on VS2012
2035 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
2036 struct select_many_range_helper
2037 {
2038 static typename TRange::value_type get_source();
2039 static TPredicate get_predicate();
2040
2041 typedef decltype (get_predicate()(get_source())) raw_inner_range_type;
2042 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_inner_range_type>::type inner_range_type;
2043
2044 static inner_range_type get_inner_range();
2045
2046 typedef decltype (get_inner_range().front()) raw_value_type;
2047 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_value_type>::type value_type;
2048
2049 };
2050
2051 template<typename TRange, typename TPredicate>
2052 struct select_many_range : base_range
2053 {
2054 typedef select_many_range_helper<TRange, TPredicate> helper_type;
2055
2056 typedef typename helper_type::inner_range_type inner_range_type;
2057 typedef typename helper_type::value_type value_type;
2058 typedef value_type return_type;
2059 enum
2060 {
2061 returns_reference = 0,
2062 };
2063
2064 typedef select_many_range<TRange, TPredicate> this_type;
2065 typedef TRange range_type;
2066 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
2067
2068 range_type range;
2069 predicate_type predicate;
2070
2071 opt<inner_range_type> inner_range;
2072
2073
2074 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_range(
2075 range_type range
2076 , predicate_type predicate
2077 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2078 : range(std::move(range))
2079 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
2080 {
2081 }
2082
2083 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_range(select_many_range const& v)
2084 : range(v.range)
2085 , predicate(v.predicate)
2086 , inner_range(v.inner_range)
2087 {
2088 }
2089
2090 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_range(select_many_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2091 : range(std::move(v.range))
2092 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
2093 , inner_range(std::move(v.inner_range))
2094 {
2095 }
2096
2097 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2098 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2099 {
2100 return range_builder.build(*this);
2101 }
2102
2103 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2104 {
2105 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(inner_range);
2106 return inner_range->front();
2107 }
2108
2109 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2110 {
2111 if (inner_range && inner_range->next())
2112 {
2113 return true;
2114 }
2115
2116 if (range.next())
2117 {
2118 inner_range = predicate(range.front());
2119 return inner_range && inner_range->next();
2120 }
2121
2122 inner_range.clear();
2123
2124 return false;
2125 }
2126 };
2127
2128 template<typename TPredicate>
2129 struct select_many_builder : base_builder
2130 {
2131 typedef select_many_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
2132 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
2133
2134 predicate_type predicate;
2135
2136 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit select_many_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2137 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
2138 {
2139 }
2140
2141 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_builder(select_many_builder const& v)
2142 : predicate(v.predicate)
2143 {
2144 }
2145
2146 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_builder(select_many_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2147 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
2148 {
2149 }
2150
2151 template<typename TRange>
2152 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD select_many_range<TRange, TPredicate> build(TRange range) const
2153 {
2154 return select_many_range<TRange, TPredicate>(std::move(range), predicate);
2155 }
2156
2157 };
2158
2159 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2160
2161 template<
2162 typename TRange
2163 , typename TOtherRange
2164 , typename TKeySelector
2165 , typename TOtherKeySelector
2166 , typename TCombiner
2167 >
2168 struct join_range : base_range
2169 {
2170 static typename TRange::value_type get_source();
2171 static typename TOtherRange::value_type get_other_source();
2172 static TKeySelector get_key_selector();
2173 static TOtherKeySelector get_other_key_selector();
2174 static TCombiner get_combiner();
2175
2176 typedef decltype (get_key_selector() (get_source())) raw_key_type;
2177 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_key_type>::type key_type;
2178
2179 typedef decltype (get_other_key_selector() (get_other_source()))
2180 raw_other_key_type;
2181 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_other_key_type>::type other_key_type;
2182
2183 typedef decltype (get_combiner() (get_source(), get_other_source()))
2184 raw_value_type;
2185 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_value_type>::type value_type;
2186 typedef value_type return_type;
2187 enum
2188 {
2189 returns_reference = 0,
2190 };
2191
2192 typedef join_range<
2193 TRange
2194 , TOtherRange
2195 , TKeySelector
2196 , TOtherKeySelector
2197 , TCombiner
2198 > this_type;
2199 typedef TRange range_type;
2200 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2201 typedef TKeySelector key_selector_type;
2202 typedef TOtherKeySelector other_key_selector_type;
2203 typedef TCombiner combiner_type;
2204 typedef std::multimap<
2205 other_key_type
2206 , typename TOtherRange::value_type
2207 > map_type;
2208 typedef typename map_type::const_iterator map_iterator_type;
2209
2210 range_type range;
2211 other_range_type other_range;
2212 key_selector_type key_selector;
2213 other_key_selector_type other_key_selector;
2214 combiner_type combiner;
2215
2216 bool start;
2217 map_type map;
2218 map_iterator_type current;
2219
2220 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_range(
2221 range_type range
2222 , other_range_type other_range
2223 , key_selector_type key_selector
2224 , other_key_selector_type other_key_selector
2225 , combiner_type combiner
2226 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2227 : range(std::move(range))
2228 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
2229 , key_selector(std::move(key_selector))
2230 , other_key_selector(std::move(other_key_selector))
2231 , combiner(std::move(combiner))
2232 , start(true)
2233 {
2234 }
2235
2236 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_range(join_range const& v)
2237 : range(v.range)
2238 , other_range(v.other_range)
2239 , key_selector(v.key_selector)
2240 , other_key_selector(v.other_key_selector)
2241 , combiner(v.combiner)
2242 , start(v.start)
2243 , map(v.map)
2244 , current(v.current)
2245 {
2246 }
2247
2248 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_range(join_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2249 : range(std::move(v.range))
2250 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2251 , key_selector(std::move(v.key_selector))
2252 , other_key_selector(std::move(v.other_key_selector))
2253 , combiner(std::move(v.combiner))
2254 , start(std::move(v.start))
2255 , map(std::move(v.map))
2256 , current(std::move(v.current))
2257 {
2258 }
2259
2260 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2261 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2262 {
2263 return range_builder.build(*this);
2264 }
2265
2266 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2267 {
2268 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current != map.end());
2269 return combiner(range.front(), current->second);
2270 }
2271
2272 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2273 {
2274 if (start)
2275 {
2276 start = false;
2277 while (other_range.next())
2278 {
2279 auto other_value = other_range.front();
2280 auto other_key = other_key_selector(other_value);
2281 map.insert(typename map_type::value_type(std::move(other_key), std::move(other_value)));
2282 }
2283
2284 current = map.end();
2285 if (map.size() == 0U)
2286 {
2287 return false;
2288 }
2289 }
2290
2291 if (current != map.end())
2292 {
2293 auto previous = current;
2294 ++current;
2295 if (current != map.end() && !(previous->first < current->first))
2296 {
2297 return true;
2298 }
2299 }
2300
2301 while (range.next())
2302 {
2303 auto value = range.front();
2304 auto key = key_selector(value);
2305
2306 current = map.find(key);
2307 if (current != map.end())
2308 {
2309 return true;
2310 }
2311 }
2312
2313 return false;
2314 }
2315 };
2316
2317 template<
2318 typename TOtherRange
2319 , typename TKeySelector
2320 , typename TOtherKeySelector
2321 , typename TCombiner
2322 >
2323 struct join_builder : base_builder
2324 {
2325 typedef join_builder<
2326 TOtherRange
2327 , TKeySelector
2328 , TOtherKeySelector
2329 , TCombiner
2330 > this_type;
2331
2332 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2333 typedef TKeySelector key_selector_type;
2334 typedef TOtherKeySelector other_key_selector_type;
2335 typedef TCombiner combiner_type;
2336
2337 other_range_type other_range;
2338 key_selector_type key_selector;
2339 other_key_selector_type other_key_selector;
2340 combiner_type combiner;
2341
2342 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_builder(
2343 other_range_type other_range
2344 , key_selector_type key_selector
2345 , other_key_selector_type other_key_selector
2346 , combiner_type combiner
2347 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2348 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
2349 , key_selector(std::move(key_selector))
2350 , other_key_selector(std::move(other_key_selector))
2351 , combiner(std::move(combiner))
2352 {
2353 }
2354
2355 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_builder(join_builder const& v)
2356 : other_range(v.other_range)
2357 , key_selector(v.key_selector)
2358 , other_key_selector(v.other_key_selector)
2359 , combiner(v.combiner)
2360 {
2361 }
2362
2363 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_builder(join_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2364 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2365 , key_selector(std::move(v.key_selector))
2366 , other_key_selector(std::move(v.other_key_selector))
2367 , combiner(std::move(v.combiner))
2368 {
2369 }
2370
2371 template<typename TRange>
2372 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD join_range<TRange, TOtherRange, TKeySelector, TOtherKeySelector, TCombiner> build(TRange range) const
2373 {
2374 return join_range<TRange, TOtherRange, TKeySelector, TOtherKeySelector, TCombiner>(
2375 std::move(range)
2376 , other_range
2377 , key_selector
2378 , other_key_selector
2379 , combiner
2380 );
2381 }
2382 };
2383
2384
2385 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2386
2387 template<typename TRange>
2388 struct distinct_range : base_range
2389 {
2390 typedef distinct_range<TRange> this_type;
2391 typedef TRange range_type;
2392
2393 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
2394 typedef value_type const& return_type;
2395 enum
2396 {
2397 returns_reference = 1,
2398 };
2399
2400 typedef std::set<value_type> set_type;
2401 typedef typename set_type::const_iterator set_iterator_type;
2402
2403 range_type range;
2404 set_type set;
2405 set_iterator_type current;
2406
2407 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_range(
2408 range_type range
2409 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2410 : range(std::move(range))
2411 {
2412 }
2413
2414 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_range(distinct_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2415 : range(v.range)
2416 , set(v.set)
2417 , current(v.current)
2418 {
2419 }
2420
2421 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_range(distinct_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2422 : range(std::move(v.range))
2423 , set(std::move(v.set))
2424 , current(std::move(v.current))
2425 {
2426 }
2427
2428 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2429 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2430 {
2431 return range_builder.build(*this);
2432 }
2433
2434 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2435 {
2436 return *current;
2437 }
2438
2439 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2440 {
2441 while (range.next())
2442 {
2443 auto result = set.insert(range.front());
2444 if (result.second)
2445 {
2446 current = result.first;
2447 return true;
2448 }
2449 }
2450
2451 return false;
2452 }
2453 };
2454
2455 struct distinct_builder : base_builder
2456 {
2457 typedef distinct_builder this_type;
2458
2459 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2460 {
2461 }
2462
2463 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_builder(distinct_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2464 {
2465 }
2466
2467 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_builder(distinct_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2468 {
2469 }
2470
2471 template<typename TRange>
2472 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD distinct_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
2473 {
2474 return distinct_range<TRange>(std::move(range));
2475 }
2476 };
2477
2478 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2479
2480 template<typename TRange, typename TOtherRange>
2481 struct union_range : base_range
2482 {
2483 typedef union_range<TRange, TOtherRange> this_type;
2484 typedef TRange range_type;
2485 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2486
2487 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
2488 typedef value_type const& return_type;
2489 enum
2490 {
2491 returns_reference = 1,
2492 };
2493
2494 typedef std::set<value_type> set_type;
2495 typedef typename set_type::const_iterator set_iterator_type;
2496
2497
2498 range_type range;
2499 other_range_type other_range;
2500 set_type set;
2501 set_iterator_type current;
2502
2503 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_range(
2504 range_type range
2505 , other_range_type other_range
2506 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2507 : range(std::move(range))
2508 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
2509 {
2510 }
2511
2512 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_range(union_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2513 : range(v.range)
2514 , other_range(v.other_range)
2515 , set(v.set)
2516 , current(v.current)
2517 {
2518 }
2519
2520 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_range(union_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2521 : range(std::move(v.range))
2522 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2523 , set(std::move(v.set))
2524 , current(std::move(v.current))
2525 {
2526 }
2527
2528 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2529 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2530 {
2531 return range_builder.build(*this);
2532 }
2533
2534 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2535 {
2536 return *current;
2537 }
2538
2539 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2540 {
2541 while (range.next())
2542 {
2543 auto result = set.insert(range.front());
2544 if (result.second)
2545 {
2546 current = result.first;
2547 return true;
2548 }
2549 }
2550
2551 while (other_range.next())
2552 {
2553 auto result = set.insert(other_range.front());
2554 if (result.second)
2555 {
2556 current = result.first;
2557 return true;
2558 }
2559 }
2560
2561 return false;
2562 }
2563 };
2564
2565 template <typename TOtherRange>
2566 struct union_builder : base_builder
2567 {
2568 typedef union_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
2569 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2570
2571 other_range_type other_range;
2572
2573 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2574 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
2575 {
2576 }
2577
2578 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_builder(union_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2579 : other_range(v.other_range)
2580 {
2581 }
2582
2583 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_builder(union_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2584 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2585 {
2586 }
2587
2588 template <typename TRange>
2589 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD union_range<TRange, TOtherRange> build(TRange range) const
2590 {
2591 return union_range<TRange, TOtherRange>(std::move(range), std::move(other_range));
2592 }
2593 };
2594
2595 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2596
2597 template<typename TRange, typename TOtherRange>
2598 struct intersect_range : base_range
2599 {
2600 typedef intersect_range<TRange, TOtherRange> this_type;
2601 typedef TRange range_type;
2602 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2603
2604 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
2605 typedef value_type const& return_type;
2606 enum
2607 {
2608 returns_reference = 1,
2609 };
2610
2611 typedef std::set<value_type> set_type;
2612 typedef typename set_type::const_iterator set_iterator_type;
2613
2614
2615 range_type range;
2616 other_range_type other_range;
2617 set_type set;
2618 set_iterator_type current;
2619 bool start;
2620
2621 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_range(
2622 range_type range
2623 , other_range_type other_range
2624 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2625 : range(std::move(range))
2626 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
2627 , start(true)
2628 {
2629 }
2630
2631 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_range(intersect_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2632 : range(v.range)
2633 , other_range(v.other_range)
2634 , set(v.set)
2635 , current(v.current)
2636 , start(v.start)
2637 {
2638 }
2639
2640 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_range(intersect_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2641 : range(std::move(v.range))
2642 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2643 , set(std::move(v.set))
2644 , current(std::move(v.current))
2645 , start(std::move(v.start))
2646 {
2647 }
2648
2649 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2650 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2651 {
2652 return range_builder.build(*this);
2653 }
2654
2655 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2656 {
2657 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(!start);
2658 return *current;
2659 }
2660
2661 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2662 {
2663 if (start)
2664 {
2665 start = false;
2666
2667 while (other_range.next())
2668 {
2669 set.insert(other_range.front());
2670 }
2671
2672 while (range.next())
2673 {
2674 current = set.find(range.front());
2675 if (current != set.end())
2676 {
2677 return true;
2678 }
2679 }
2680
2681 set.clear();
2682
2683 return false;
2684 }
2685
2686 if (set.empty())
2687 {
2688 return false;
2689 }
2690
2691 set.erase(current);
2692
2693 while (range.next())
2694 {
2695 current = set.find(range.front());
2696 if (current != set.end())
2697 {
2698 return true;
2699 }
2700 }
2701
2702 return false;
2703 }
2704 };
2705
2706 template <typename TOtherRange>
2707 struct intersect_builder : base_builder
2708 {
2709 typedef intersect_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
2710 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2711
2712 other_range_type other_range;
2713
2714 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2715 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
2716 {
2717 }
2718
2719 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_builder(intersect_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2720 : other_range(v.other_range)
2721 {
2722 }
2723
2724 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_builder(intersect_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2725 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2726 {
2727 }
2728
2729 template <typename TRange>
2730 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD intersect_range<TRange, TOtherRange> build(TRange range) const
2731 {
2732 return intersect_range<TRange, TOtherRange>(std::move(range), std::move(other_range));
2733 }
2734 };
2735
2736 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2737
2738 template<typename TRange, typename TOtherRange>
2739 struct except_range : base_range
2740 {
2741 typedef except_range<TRange, TOtherRange> this_type;
2742 typedef TRange range_type;
2743 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2744
2745 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
2746 typedef value_type const& return_type;
2747 enum
2748 {
2749 returns_reference = 1,
2750 };
2751
2752 typedef std::set<value_type> set_type;
2753 typedef typename set_type::const_iterator set_iterator_type;
2754
2755 range_type range;
2756 other_range_type other_range;
2757 set_type set;
2758 set_iterator_type current;
2759 bool start;
2760
2761 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_range(
2762 range_type range
2763 , other_range_type other_range
2764 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2765 : range(std::move(range))
2766 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
2767 , start(true)
2768 {
2769 }
2770
2771 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_range(except_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2772 : range(v.range)
2773 , other_range(v.other_range)
2774 , set(v.set)
2775 , current(v.current)
2776 , start(v.start)
2777 {
2778 }
2779
2780 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_range(except_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2781 : range(std::move(v.range))
2782 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2783 , set(std::move(v.set))
2784 , current(std::move(v.current))
2785 , start(std::move(v.start))
2786 {
2787 }
2788
2789 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2790 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2791 {
2792 return range_builder.build(*this);
2793 }
2794
2795 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2796 {
2797 return *current;
2798 }
2799
2800 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2801 {
2802 if (start)
2803 {
2804 start = false;
2805 while (other_range.next())
2806 {
2807 set.insert(other_range.front());
2808 }
2809 }
2810
2811 while (range.next())
2812 {
2813 auto result = set.insert(range.front());
2814 if (result.second)
2815 {
2816 current = result.first;
2817 return true;
2818 }
2819 }
2820
2821 return false;
2822 }
2823 };
2824
2825 template <typename TOtherRange>
2826 struct except_builder : base_builder
2827 {
2828 typedef union_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
2829 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2830
2831 other_range_type other_range;
2832
2833 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2834 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
2835 {
2836 }
2837
2838 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_builder(except_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2839 : other_range(v.other_range)
2840 {
2841 }
2842
2843 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_builder(except_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2844 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2845 {
2846 }
2847
2848 template <typename TRange>
2849 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD except_range<TRange, TOtherRange> build(TRange range) const
2850 {
2851 return except_range<TRange, TOtherRange>(std::move(range), std::move(other_range));
2852 }
2853 };
2854
2855 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2856
2857 template<typename TRange, typename TOtherRange>
2858 struct concat_range : base_range
2859 {
2860 typedef concat_range<TRange, TOtherRange> this_type;
2861 typedef TRange range_type;
2862 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2863
2864 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
2865 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TOtherRange::value_type>::type other_value_type;
2866 typedef value_type return_type;
2867
2868 enum
2869 {
2870 returns_reference = 0,
2871 };
2872
2873 enum state
2874 {
2875 state_initial,
2876 state_iterating_range,
2877 state_iterating_other_range,
2878 state_end,
2879 };
2880
2881 range_type range;
2882 other_range_type other_range;
2883 state state;
2884
2885 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_range(
2886 range_type range
2887 , other_range_type other_range
2888 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2889 : range(std::move(range))
2890 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
2891 , state(state_initial)
2892 {
2893 }
2894
2895 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_range(concat_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2896 : range(v.range)
2897 , other_range(v.other_range)
2898 , state(v.state)
2899 {
2900 }
2901
2902 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_range(concat_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2903 : range(std::move(v.range))
2904 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2905 , state(std::move(v.state))
2906 {
2907 }
2908
2909 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
2910 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
2911 {
2912 return range_builder.build(*this);
2913 }
2914
2915 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
2916 {
2917 switch (state)
2918 {
2919 case state_initial:
2920 case state_end:
2921 default:
2922 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(false); // Intentionally falls through
2923 case state_iterating_range:
2924 return range.front();
2925 case state_iterating_other_range:
2926 return other_range.front();
2927 };
2928 }
2929
2930 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
2931 {
2932 switch (state)
2933 {
2934 case state_initial:
2935 if (range.next())
2936 {
2937 state = state_iterating_range;
2938 return true;
2939 }
2940
2941 if (other_range.next())
2942 {
2943 state = state_iterating_other_range;
2944 return true;
2945 }
2946
2947 state = state_end;
2948 return false;
2949 case state_iterating_range:
2950 if (range.next())
2951 {
2952 return true;
2953 }
2954
2955 if (other_range.next())
2956 {
2957 state = state_iterating_other_range;
2958 return true;
2959 }
2960
2961 state = state_end;
2962 return false;
2963 case state_iterating_other_range:
2964 if (other_range.next())
2965 {
2966 return true;
2967 }
2968
2969 state = state_end;
2970 return false;
2971 case state_end:
2972 default:
2973 return false;
2974 }
2975 }
2976 };
2977
2978 template <typename TOtherRange>
2979 struct concat_builder : base_builder
2980 {
2981 typedef concat_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
2982 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
2983
2984 other_range_type other_range;
2985
2986 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2987 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
2988 {
2989 }
2990
2991 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_builder(concat_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2992 : other_range(v.other_range)
2993 {
2994 }
2995
2996 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_builder(concat_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
2997 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
2998 {
2999 }
3000
3001 template <typename TRange>
3002 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concat_range<TRange, TOtherRange> build(TRange range) const
3003 {
3004 return concat_range<TRange, TOtherRange>(std::move(range), std::move(other_range));
3005 }
3006 };
3007
3008 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3009
3010 namespace experimental
3011 {
3012 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3013
3014 // TODO: Verify that container range aggregator has the right semantics
3015
3016 template<typename TRange>
3017 struct container_iterator
3018 {
3019 typedef std::forward_iterator_tag iterator_category;
3020 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
3021 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
3022 enum
3023 {
3024 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
3025 };
3026
3027 typedef std::ptrdiff_t difference_type;
3028 typedef value_type* pointer;
3029 typedef value_type& reference;
3030
3031 typedef container_iterator<TRange> this_type;
3032 typedef TRange range_type;
3033
3034 bool has_value;
3035 opt<range_type> range;
3036
3037 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3038 : has_value(false)
3039 {
3040 }
3041
3042 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator(range_type r) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3043 : range(std::move(r))
3044 {
3045 has_value = range && range->next();
3046 }
3047
3048 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator(container_iterator const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3049 : has_value(v.has_value)
3050 , range(v.range)
3051 {
3052 }
3053
3054 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator(container_iterator&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3055 : has_value(std::move(v.has_value))
3056 , range(std::move(v.range))
3057 {
3058 }
3059
3060 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type operator* () const
3061 {
3062 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(has_value);
3063 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(range);
3064 return range->front();
3065 }
3066
3067 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD value_type const* operator-> () const
3068 {
3069 static_assert (
3070 returns_reference
3071 , "operator-> requires a range that returns a reference, typically select causes ranges to return values not references"
3072 );
3073 return &range->front();
3074 }
3075
3076 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD this_type& operator++()
3077 {
3078 if (has_value && range)
3079 {
3080 has_value = range->next();
3081 }
3082
3083 return *this;
3084 }
3085
3086 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool operator== (this_type const& v) const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3087 {
3088 if (!has_value && !v.has_value)
3089 {
3090 return true;
3091 }
3092 else if (has_value && has_value && range.get_ptr() == v.range.get_ptr())
3093 {
3094 return true;
3095 }
3096 else
3097 {
3098 return false;
3099 }
3100 }
3101
3102 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool operator!= (this_type const& v) const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3103 {
3104 return !(*this == v);
3105 }
3106 };
3107
3108 template<typename TRange>
3109 struct container
3110 {
3111 typedef container<TRange> this_type;
3112 typedef TRange range_type;
3113 typedef typename TRange::value_type value_type;
3114 typedef typename TRange::return_type return_type;
3115 enum
3116 {
3117 returns_reference = TRange::returns_reference,
3118 };
3119
3120 range_type range;
3121
3122 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit container(TRange range)
3123 : range(std::move(range))
3124 {
3125 }
3126
3127 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container(container const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3128 : range(v.range)
3129 {
3130 }
3131
3132 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container(container&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3133 : range(std::move(v.range))
3134 {
3135 }
3136
3137 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator<TRange> begin() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3138 {
3139 return container_iterator<TRange>(range);
3140 }
3141
3142 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_iterator<TRange> end() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3143 {
3144 return container_iterator<TRange>();
3145 }
3146
3147 };
3148
3149 struct container_builder : base_builder
3150 {
3151 typedef container_builder this_type;
3152
3153 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3154 {
3155 }
3156
3157 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_builder(container_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3158 {
3159 }
3160
3161 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD container_builder(container_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3162 {
3163 }
3164
3165 template<typename TRange>
3166 CPPLINQ_METHOD container<TRange> build(TRange range) const
3167 {
3168 return container<TRange>(std::move(range));
3169 }
3170
3171 };
3172 }
3173
3174 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3175
3176 struct to_vector_builder : base_builder
3177 {
3178 typedef to_vector_builder this_type;
3179
3180 size_type capacity;
3181
3182 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit to_vector_builder(size_type capacity = 16U) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3183 : capacity(capacity)
3184 {
3185 }
3186
3187 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_vector_builder(to_vector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3188 : capacity(v.capacity)
3189 {
3190 }
3191
3192 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_vector_builder(to_vector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3193 : capacity(std::move(v.capacity))
3194 {
3195 }
3196
3197 template<typename TRange>
3198 CPPLINQ_METHOD std::vector<typename TRange::value_type> build(TRange range) const
3199 {
3200 std::vector<typename TRange::value_type> result;
3201 result.reserve(capacity);
3202
3203 while (range.next())
3204 {
3205 result.push_back(range.front());
3206 }
3207
3208 return result;
3209 }
3210
3211 };
3212
3213 struct to_list_builder : base_builder
3214 {
3215 typedef to_list_builder this_type;
3216
3217 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit to_list_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3218 {
3219 }
3220
3221 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_list_builder(to_list_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3222 {
3223 }
3224
3225 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_list_builder(to_list_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3226 {
3227 }
3228
3229 template<typename TRange>
3230 CPPLINQ_METHOD std::list<typename TRange::value_type> build(TRange range) const
3231 {
3232 std::list<typename TRange::value_type> result;
3233
3234 while (range.next())
3235 {
3236 result.push_back(range.front());
3237 }
3238
3239 return result;
3240 }
3241
3242 };
3243
3244 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3245
3246 template<typename TKeyPredicate>
3247 struct to_map_builder : base_builder
3248 {
3249 static TKeyPredicate get_key_predicate();
3250
3251 typedef to_map_builder<TKeyPredicate> this_type;
3252 typedef TKeyPredicate key_predicate_type;
3253
3254 key_predicate_type key_predicate;
3255
3256 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit to_map_builder(key_predicate_type key_predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3257 : key_predicate(std::move(key_predicate))
3258 {
3259 }
3260
3261 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_map_builder(to_map_builder const& v)
3262 : key_predicate(v.key_predicate)
3263 {
3264 }
3265
3266 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_map_builder(to_map_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3267 : key_predicate(std::move(v.key_predicate))
3268 {
3269 }
3270
3271 template<typename TRange>
3272 CPPLINQ_METHOD std::map<
3273 typename get_transformed_type<key_predicate_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type
3274 , typename TRange::value_type
3275 > build(TRange range) const
3276 {
3277 typedef std::map<
3278 typename get_transformed_type<key_predicate_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type
3279 , typename TRange::value_type
3280 > result_type;
3281
3282 result_type result;
3283
3284 while (range.next())
3285 {
3286 auto v = range.front();
3287 auto k = key_predicate(v);
3288
3289 result.insert(typename result_type::value_type(std::move(k), std::move(v)));
3290 }
3291
3292 return result;
3293 }
3294
3295 };
3296
3297 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3298
3299 template<typename TKey, typename TValue>
3300 struct lookup
3301 {
3302 typedef TKey key_type;
3303 typedef TValue value_type;
3304
3305 typedef std::vector<std::pair<key_type, size_type>> keys_type;
3306 typedef std::vector<value_type> values_type;
3307
3308 typedef typename values_type::const_iterator values_iterator_type;
3309
3310 template<typename TRange, typename TSelector>
3311 CPPLINQ_METHOD lookup(size_type capacity, TRange range, TSelector selector)
3312 {
3313 keys_type k;
3314 values_type v;
3315 k.reserve(capacity);
3316 v.reserve(capacity);
3317
3318 auto index = 0U;
3319 while (range.next())
3320 {
3321 auto value = range.front();
3322 auto key = selector(value);
3323 v.push_back(std::move(value));
3324 k.push_back(typename keys_type::value_type(std::move(key), index));
3325 ++index;
3326 }
3327
3328 if (v.size() == 0)
3329 {
3330 return;
3331 }
3332
3333 std::sort(
3334 k.begin()
3335 , k.end()
3336 , [](typename keys_type::value_type const& l, typename keys_type::value_type const& r)
3337 {
3338 return l.first < r.first;
3339 }
3340 );
3341
3342 keys.reserve(k.size());
3343 values.reserve(v.size());
3344
3345 auto iter = k.begin();
3346 auto end = k.end();
3347
3348 index = 0U;
3349
3350 if (iter != end)
3351 {
3352 values.push_back(std::move(v[iter->second]));
3353 keys.push_back(typename keys_type::value_type(iter->first, index));
3354 }
3355
3356 auto previous = iter;
3357 ++iter;
3358 ++index;
3359
3360 while (iter != end)
3361 {
3362 values.push_back(v[iter->second]);
3363
3364 if (previous->first < iter->first)
3365 {
3366 keys.push_back(typename keys_type::value_type(iter->first, index));
3367 }
3368
3369 previous = iter;
3370 ++iter;
3371 ++index;
3372 }
3373 }
3374
3375 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup(lookup const& v)
3376 : values(v.values)
3377 , keys(v.keys)
3378 {
3379 }
3380
3381 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup(lookup&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3382 : values(std::move(v.values))
3383 , keys(std::move(v.keys))
3384 {
3385 }
3386
3387 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD void swap(lookup& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3388 {
3389 values.swap(v.values);
3390 keys.swap(v.keys);
3391 }
3392
3393 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup& operator= (lookup const& v)
3394 {
3395 if (this == std::addressof(v))
3396 {
3397 return *this;
3398 }
3399
3400 lookup tmp(v);
3401
3402 swap(tmp);
3403
3404 return *this;
3405 }
3406
3407 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup& operator= (lookup&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3408 {
3409 if (this == std::addressof(v))
3410 {
3411 return *this;
3412 }
3413
3414 swap(v);
3415
3416 return *this;
3417 }
3418
3419 struct lookup_range : base_range
3420 {
3421 typedef lookup_range this_type;
3422
3423 enum
3424 {
3425 returns_reference = 1,
3426 };
3427
3428 typedef TValue value_type;
3429 typedef value_type const& return_type;
3430
3431 enum state
3432 {
3433 state_initial,
3434 state_iterating,
3435 state_end,
3436 };
3437
3438 values_type const* values;
3439 size_type iter;
3440 size_type end;
3441 state state;
3442
3443 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup_range(
3444 values_type const* values
3445 , size_type iter
3446 , size_type end
3447 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3448 : values(values)
3449 , iter(iter)
3450 , end(end)
3451 , state(state_initial)
3452 {
3453 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(values);
3454 }
3455
3456 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup_range(lookup_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3457 : values(v.values)
3458 , iter(v.iter)
3459 , end(v.end)
3460 , state(v.state)
3461 {
3462 }
3463
3464 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup_range(lookup_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3465 : values(std::move(v.values))
3466 , iter(std::move(v.iter))
3467 , end(std::move(v.end))
3468 , state(std::move(v.state))
3469 {
3470 }
3471
3472 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
3473 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
3474 {
3475 return range_builder.build(*this);
3476 }
3477
3478 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3479 {
3480 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(state == state_iterating);
3481 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(iter < end);
3482
3483 return (*values)[iter];
3484 }
3485
3486 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3487 {
3488 switch (state)
3489 {
3490 case state_initial:
3491 {
3492 auto has_elements = iter < end;
3493 state = has_elements ? state_iterating : state_end;
3494 return has_elements;
3495 }
3496 break;
3497 case state_iterating:
3498 {
3499 ++iter;
3500
3501 auto has_elements = iter < end;
3502 state = has_elements ? state_iterating : state_end;
3503 return has_elements;
3504 }
3505 break;
3506 case state_end:
3507 default:
3508 return false;
3509 }
3510 }
3511
3512 };
3513
3514 CPPLINQ_METHOD lookup_range operator[](key_type const& key) const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3515 {
3516 if (values.empty())
3517 {
3518 return lookup_range(std::addressof(values), 0U, 0U);
3519 }
3520
3521 auto find = std::lower_bound(
3522 keys.begin()
3523 , keys.end()
3524 , typename keys_type::value_type(key, 0U)
3525 , [](typename keys_type::value_type const& l, typename keys_type::value_type const& r)
3526 {
3527 return l.first < r.first;
3528 });
3529
3530 if (find == keys.end())
3531 {
3532 return lookup_range(std::addressof(values), 0U, 0U);
3533 }
3534
3535 auto next = find + 1;
3536 if (next == keys.end())
3537 {
3538 return lookup_range(std::addressof(values), find->second, values.size());
3539 }
3540
3541 return lookup_range(std::addressof(values), find->second, next->second);
3542 }
3543
3544 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD size_type size_of_keys() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3545 {
3546 return keys.size();
3547 }
3548
3549 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD size_type size_of_values() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3550 {
3551 return values.size();
3552 }
3553
3554 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD from_range<values_iterator_type> range_of_values() const CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3555 {
3556 return from_range<values_iterator_type>(
3557 values.begin()
3558 , values.end()
3559 );
3560 }
3561
3562 private:
3563 values_type values;
3564 keys_type keys;
3565 };
3566
3567 template<typename TKeyPredicate>
3568 struct to_lookup_builder : base_builder
3569 {
3570 static TKeyPredicate get_key_predicate();
3571
3572 typedef to_lookup_builder<TKeyPredicate> this_type;
3573 typedef TKeyPredicate key_predicate_type;
3574
3575 key_predicate_type key_predicate;
3576
3577 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit to_lookup_builder(key_predicate_type key_predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3578 : key_predicate(std::move(key_predicate))
3579 {
3580 }
3581
3582 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_lookup_builder(to_lookup_builder const& v)
3583 : key_predicate(v.key_predicate)
3584 {
3585 }
3586
3587 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD to_lookup_builder(to_lookup_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3588 : key_predicate(std::move(v.key_predicate))
3589 {
3590 }
3591
3592 template<typename TRange>
3593 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD lookup<
3594 typename get_transformed_type<key_predicate_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type
3595 , typename TRange::value_type
3596 > build(TRange range) const
3597 {
3598 typedef lookup<
3599 typename get_transformed_type<key_predicate_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type
3600 , typename TRange::value_type
3601 > result_type;
3602
3603 result_type result(16U, range, key_predicate);
3604
3605 return result;
3606 }
3607
3608 };
3609
3610 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
3611
3612 template<typename TPredicate>
3613 struct for_each_builder : base_builder
3614 {
3615 typedef for_each_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
3616 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
3617
3618 predicate_type predicate;
3619
3620 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD explicit for_each_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3621 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
3622 {
3623 }
3624
3625 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD for_each_builder(for_each_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3626 : predicate(v.predicate)
3627 {
3628 }
3629
3630 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD for_each_builder(for_each_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3631 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
3632 {
3633 }
3634
3635
3636 template<typename TRange>
3637 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD void build(TRange range) const
3638 {
3639 while (range.next())
3640 {
3641 predicate(range.front());
3642 }
3643 }
3644
3645 };
3646
3647 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------

3649 template<typename TPredicate>
3650 struct first_predicate_builder : base_builder
3651 {
3652 typedef first_predicate_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
3653 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
3654
3655 predicate_type predicate;
3656
3657 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD first_predicate_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3658 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
3659 {
3660 }
3661
3662 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD first_predicate_builder(first_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3663 : predicate(v.predicate)
3664 {
3665 }
3666
3667 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD first_predicate_builder(first_predicate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3668 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
3669 {
3670 }
3671
3672 template<typename TRange>
3673 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename TRange::value_type build(TRange range)
3674 {
3675 while (range.next())
3676 {
3677 if (predicate(range.front()))
3678 {
3679 return range.front();
3680 }
3681 }
3682
3683 throw sequence_empty_exception();
3684 }
3685
3686 };

3792 struct last_or_default_predicate_builder : base_builder
3793 {

3797 predicate_type predicate;

3800 : predicate(std::move(predicate))

3805 : predicate(v.predicate)
3806 {

3811 {

3814 template<typename TRange>

3816 {
3817 auto current = typename TRange::value_type();
3818
3819 while (range.next())
3820 {
3821 if (predicate(range.front()))
3822 {
3823 current = std::move(range.front());
3824 }
3825 }
3826
3827 return current;
3828 }
3829
3830 };

3867 {

3871 predicate_type predicate;

3874 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
3875 {
3876 }
3877
3878 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD count_predicate_builder(count_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3879 : predicate(v.predicate)
3880 {
3881 }

3884 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
3885 {
3886 }

3888
3889 template<typename TRange>
3890 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD size_type build(TRange range) const
3891 {
3892 size_type count = 0U;
3893 while (range.next())
3894 {
3895 if (predicate(range.front()))
3896 {
3897 ++count;
3898 }
3899 }
3900 return count;
3901 }
3902
3903 };

3937 template <typename TSelector>
3938 struct sum_selector_builder : base_builder
3939 {
3940 typedef sum_selector_builder<TSelector> this_type;
3941 typedef TSelector selector_type;
3942
3943 selector_type selector;
3944
3945 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sum_selector_builder(selector_type selector) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3946 : selector(std::move(selector))
3947 {
3948 }
3949
3950 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sum_selector_builder(sum_selector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3951 : selector(v.selector)
3952 {
3953 }
3954
3955 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sum_selector_builder(sum_selector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3956 : selector(std::move(v.selector))
3957 {
3958 }
3959
3960 template<typename TRange>
3961 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type build(TRange range) const
3962 {
3963 typedef typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
3964
3965 auto sum = value_type();
3966 while (range.next())
3967 {
3968 sum += selector(range.front());
3969 }
3970 return sum;
3971 }
3972
3973 };
3974
3975 struct sum_builder : base_builder
3976 {
3977 typedef sum_builder this_type;
3978

3980 {

3982

3984 {
3985 }
3986
3987 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sum_builder(sum_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
3988 {
3989 }
3990
3991 template<typename TRange>
3992 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename TRange::value_type build(TRange range) const
3993 {
3994 auto sum = typename TRange::value_type();
3995 while (range.next())
3996 {
3997 sum += range.front();
3998 }
3999 return sum;
4000 }
4001
4002 };

4005
4006 template <typename TSelector>
4007 struct max_selector_builder : base_builder
4008 {
4009 typedef max_selector_builder<TSelector> this_type;
4010 typedef TSelector selector_type;
4011
4012 selector_type selector;
4013
4014 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_selector_builder(selector_type selector) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4015 : selector(std::move(selector))
4016 {
4017 }
4018
4019 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_selector_builder(max_selector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4020 : selector(v.selector)
4021 {
4022 }
4023
4024 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_selector_builder(max_selector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4025 : selector(std::move(v.selector))
4026 {
4027 }
4028
4029 template<typename TRange>
4030 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type build(TRange range) const
4031 {
4032 typedef typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
4033
4034 auto current = std::numeric_limits<value_type>::lowest();
4035 while (range.next())
4036 {
4037 auto v = selector(range.front());
4038 if (current < v)
4039 {
4040 current = std::move(v);
4041 }
4042 }
4043
4044 return current;
4045 }
4046
4047 };
4048
4049 struct max_builder : base_builder
4050 {
4051 typedef max_builder this_type;
4052
4053 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4054 {
4055 }
4056
4057 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_builder(max_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4058 {
4059 }
4060
4061 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD max_builder(max_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4062 {
4063 }
4064
4065
4066 template<typename TRange>
4067 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename TRange::value_type build(TRange range) const
4068 {
4069 auto current = std::numeric_limits<typename TRange::value_type>::lowest();
4070 while (range.next())
4071 {
4072 auto v = range.front();
4073 if (current < v)
4074 {
4075 current = std::move(v);
4076 }
4077 }
4078
4079 return current;
4080 }
4081
4082 };
4083

4086 template <typename TSelector>
4087 struct min_selector_builder : base_builder
4088 {
4089 typedef min_selector_builder<TSelector> this_type;
4090 typedef TSelector selector_type;
4091
4092 selector_type selector;
4093
4094 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD min_selector_builder(selector_type selector) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4095 : selector(std::move(selector))
4096 {
4097 }
4098
4099 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD min_selector_builder(min_selector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4100 : selector(v.selector)
4101 {
4102 }
4103
4104 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD min_selector_builder(min_selector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4105 : selector(std::move(v.selector))
4106 {
4107 }

4109
4110 template<typename TRange>
4111 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type build(TRange range) const
4112 {
4113 typedef typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
4114
4115 auto current = std::numeric_limits<value_type>::max();
4116 while (range.next())
4117 {
4118 auto v = selector(range.front());
4119 if (v < current)
4120 {
4121 current = std::move(v);
4122 }
4123 }
4124
4125 return current;
4126 }
4127
4128 };

4151 while (range.next())
4152 {
