4174
4175 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_selector_builder(selector_type selector) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4176 : selector(std::move(selector))
4177 {
4178 }
4179
4180 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_selector_builder(avg_selector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4181 : selector(v.selector)
4182 {
4183 }
4184
4185 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_selector_builder(avg_selector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4186 : selector(std::move(v.selector))
4187 {
4188 }
4189
4190
4191 template<typename TRange>
4192 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type build(TRange range) const
4193 {
4194 typedef typename get_transformed_type<selector_type, typename TRange::value_type>::type value_type;
4195
4196 auto sum = value_type();
4197 int count = 0;
4198 while (range.next())
4199 {
4200 sum += selector(range.front());
4201 ++count;
4202 }
4203
4204 if (count == 0)
4205 {
4206 return sum;
4207 }
4208
4209 return sum / count;
4210 }
4211
4212 };
4213
4214 struct avg_builder : base_builder
4215 {
4216 typedef avg_builder this_type;
4217
4218 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4219 {
4220 }
4221
4222 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_builder(avg_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4223 {
4224 }
4225
4226 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD avg_builder(avg_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4227 {
4228 }
4229
4230
4231 template<typename TRange>
4232 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename TRange::value_type build(TRange range) const
4233 {
4234 auto sum = typename TRange::value_type();
4235 int count = 0;
4236 while (range.next())
4237 {
4238 sum += range.front();
4239 ++count;
4240 }
4241
4242 if (count == 0)
4243 {
4244 return sum;
4245 }
4246
4247 return sum / count;
4248 }
4249
4250 };
4251
4252 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4253
4254 template <typename TAccumulate, typename TAccumulator>
4255 struct aggregate_builder : base_builder
4256 {
4257 typedef aggregate_builder<TAccumulate, TAccumulator> this_type;
4258 typedef TAccumulator accumulator_type;
4259 typedef TAccumulate seed_type;
4260
4261 seed_type seed;
4262 accumulator_type accumulator;
4263
4264 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_builder(seed_type seed, accumulator_type accumulator) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4265 : seed(std::move(seed))
4266 , accumulator(std::move(accumulator))
4267 {
4268 }
4269
4270 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_builder(aggregate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4271 : seed(v.seed)
4272 , accumulator(v.accumulator)
4273 {
4274 }
4275
4276 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_builder(aggregate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4277 : seed(std::move(v.seed))
4278 , accumulator(std::move(v.accumulator))
4279 {
4280 }
4281
4282 template<typename TRange>
4283 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD seed_type build(TRange range) const
4284 {
4285 auto sum = seed;
4286 while (range.next())
4287 {
4288 sum = accumulator(sum, range.front());
4289 }
4290 return sum;
4291 }
4292
4293 };
4294
4295 template <typename TAccumulate, typename TAccumulator, typename TSelector>
4296 struct aggregate_result_selector_builder : base_builder
4297 {
4298 typedef aggregate_result_selector_builder<TAccumulate, TAccumulator, TSelector> this_type;
4299 typedef TAccumulator accumulator_type;
4300 typedef TAccumulate seed_type;
4301 typedef TSelector result_selector_type;
4302
4303 seed_type seed;
4304 accumulator_type accumulator;
4305 result_selector_type result_selector;
4306
4307 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_result_selector_builder(seed_type seed, accumulator_type accumulator, result_selector_type result_selector) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4308 : seed(std::move(seed))
4309 , accumulator(std::move(accumulator))
4310 , result_selector(std::move(result_selector))
4311 {
4312 }
4313
4314 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_result_selector_builder(aggregate_result_selector_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4315 : seed(v.seed)
4316 , accumulator(v.accumulator)
4317 , result_selector(v.result_selector)
4318 {
4319 }
4320
4321 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD aggregate_result_selector_builder(aggregate_result_selector_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4322 : seed(std::move(v.seed))
4323 , accumulator(std::move(v.accumulator))
4324 , result_selector(std::move(v.result_selector))
4325 {
4326 }
4327
4328 template<typename TRange>
4329 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD auto build(TRange range) const -> decltype (result_selector(seed))
4330 {
4331 auto sum = seed;
4332 while (range.next())
4333 {
4334 sum = accumulator(sum, range.front());
4335 }
4336
4337 return result_selector(sum);
4338 }
4339
4340 };
4341
4342 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4343
4344 template <typename TOtherRange, typename TComparer>
4345 struct sequence_equal_predicate_builder : base_builder
4346 {
4347 typedef sequence_equal_predicate_builder<TOtherRange, TComparer> this_type;
4348 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
4349 typedef TComparer comparer_type;
4350
4351 other_range_type other_range;
4352 comparer_type comparer;
4353
4354 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_predicate_builder(
4355 TOtherRange other_range
4356 , comparer_type comparer) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4357 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
4358 , comparer(std::move(comparer))
4359 {
4360 }
4361
4362 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_predicate_builder(sequence_equal_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4363 : other_range(v.other_range)
4364 , comparer(v.comparer)
4365 {
4366 }
4367
4368 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_predicate_builder(sequence_equal_predicate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4369 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
4370 , comparer(std::move(v.comparer))
4371 {
4372 }
4373
4374 template <typename TRange>
4375 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4376 {
4377 auto copy = other_range;
4378 for (;;)
4379 {
4380 bool next1 = range.next();
4381 bool next2 = copy.next();
4382
4383 // sequences are not of same length
4384 if (next1 != next2)
4385 {
4386 return false;
4387 }
4388
4389 // both sequences are over, next1 = next2 = false
4390 if (!next1)
4391 {
4392 return true;
4393 }
4394
4395 if (!comparer(range.front(), copy.front()))
4396 {
4397 return false;
4398 }
4399 }
4400 }
4401 };
4402
4403 template <typename TOtherRange>
4404 struct sequence_equal_builder : base_builder
4405 {
4406 typedef sequence_equal_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
4407 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
4408
4409 other_range_type other_range;
4410
4411 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4412 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
4413 {
4414 }
4415
4416 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_builder(sequence_equal_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4417 : other_range(v.other_range)
4418 {
4419 }
4420
4421 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD sequence_equal_builder(sequence_equal_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4422 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
4423 {
4424 }
4425
4426 template <typename TRange>
4427 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4428 {
4429 auto copy = other_range;
4430 for (;;)
4431 {
4432 bool next1 = range.next();
4433 bool next2 = copy.next();
4434
4435 // sequences are not of same length
4436 if (next1 != next2)
4437 {
4438 return false;
4439 }
4440
4441 // both sequences are over, next1 = next2 = false
4442 if (!next1)
4443 {
4444 return true;
4445 }
4446
4447 if (range.front() != copy.front())
4448 {
4449 return false;
4450 }
4451 }
4452 }
4453 };
4454
4455 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4456
4457 template<typename TCharType>
4458 struct concatenate_builder : base_builder
4459 {
4460 typedef concatenate_builder<TCharType> this_type;
4461
4462 std::basic_string<TCharType> separator;
4463 size_type capacity;
4464
4465 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concatenate_builder(
4466 std::basic_string<TCharType> separator
4467 , size_type capacity
4468 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4469 : separator(std::move(separator))
4470 , capacity(capacity)
4471 {
4472 }
4473
4474 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concatenate_builder(concatenate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4475 : separator(v.separator)
4476 , capacity(v.capacity)
4477 {
4478 }
4479
4480 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD concatenate_builder(concatenate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4481 : separator(std::move(v.separator))
4482 , capacity(std::move(v.capacity))
4483 {
4484 }
4485
4486 template<typename TRange>
4487 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename std::basic_string<TCharType> build(TRange range) const
4488 {
4489 auto first = true;
4490 std::vector<TCharType> buffer;
4491
4492 buffer.reserve(capacity);
4493
4494
4495 while (range.next())
4496 {
4497 if (first)
4498 {
4499 first = false;
4500 }
4501 else
4502 {
4503 buffer.insert(
4504 buffer.end()
4505 , separator.begin()
4506 , separator.end()
4507 );
4508 }
4509
4510 auto v = range.front();
4511
4512 buffer.insert(
4513 buffer.end()
4514 , v.begin()
4515 , v.end()
4516 );
4517 }
4518
4519 return std::basic_string<TCharType>(
4520 buffer.begin()
4521 , buffer.end()
4522 );
4523 }
4524
4525 };
4526
4527 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4528 template <typename TPredicate>
4529 struct any_predicate_builder : base_builder
4530 {
4531 typedef any_predicate_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
4532 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
4533
4534 predicate_type predicate;
4535
4536 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_predicate_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4537 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
4538 {
4539 }
4540
4541 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_predicate_builder(any_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4542 : predicate(v.predicate)
4543 {
4544 }
4545
4546 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_predicate_builder(any_predicate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4547 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
4548 {
4549 }
4550
4551
4552 template<typename TRange>
4553 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4554 {
4555 bool any = false;
4556 while (range.next() && !any)
4557 {
4558 any = predicate(range.front());
4559 }
4560 return any;
4561 }
4562 };
4563
4564 struct any_builder : base_builder
4565 {
4566 typedef any_builder this_type;
4567
4568 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4569 {
4570 }
4571
4572 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_builder(any_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4573 {
4574 }
4575
4576 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD any_builder(any_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4577 {
4578 }
4579
4580
4581 template<typename TRange>
4582 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4583 {
4584 return range.next();
4585 }
4586
4587 };
4588
4589 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4590
4591 template <typename TPredicate>
4592 struct all_predicate_builder : base_builder
4593 {
4594 typedef all_predicate_builder<TPredicate> this_type;
4595 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
4596
4597 predicate_type predicate;
4598
4599 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD all_predicate_builder(predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4600 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
4601 {
4602 }
4603
4604 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD all_predicate_builder(all_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4605 : predicate(v.predicate)
4606 {
4607 }
4608
4609 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD all_predicate_builder(all_predicate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4610 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
4611 {
4612 }
4613
4614 template<typename TRange>
4615 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4616 {
4617 while (range.next())
4618 {
4619 if (!predicate(range.front()))
4620 {
4621 return false;
4622 }
4623 }
4624
4625 return true;
4626 }
4627 };
4628
4629 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4630
4631 template <typename TValue>
4632 struct contains_builder : base_builder
4633 {
4634 typedef contains_builder<TValue> this_type;
4635 typedef TValue value_type;
4636
4637 value_type value;
4638
4639 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_builder(value_type value) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4640 : value(std::move(value))
4641 {
4642 }
4643
4644 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_builder(contains_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4645 : value(v.value)
4646 {
4647 }
4648
4649 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_builder(contains_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4650 : value(std::move(v.value))
4651 {
4652 }
4653
4654
4655 template<typename TRange>
4656 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4657 {
4658 while (range.next())
4659 {
4660 if (range.front() == value)
4661 {
4662 return true;
4663 }
4664 }
4665
4666 return false;
4667 }
4668
4669 };
4670
4671 template <typename TValue, typename TPredicate>
4672 struct contains_predicate_builder : base_builder
4673 {
4674 typedef contains_predicate_builder<TValue, TPredicate> this_type;
4675 typedef TValue value_type;
4676 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
4677
4678 value_type value;
4679 predicate_type predicate;
4680
4681 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_predicate_builder(value_type value, predicate_type predicate) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4682 : value(std::move(value))
4683 , predicate(std::move(predicate))
4684 {
4685 }
4686
4687 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_predicate_builder(contains_predicate_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4688 : value(v.value)
4689 , predicate(v.predicate)
4690 {
4691 }
4692
4693 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD contains_predicate_builder(contains_predicate_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4694 : value(std::move(v.value))
4695 , predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
4696 {
4697 }
4698
4699
4700 template<typename TRange>
4701 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool build(TRange range) const
4702 {
4703 while (range.next())
4704 {
4705 if (predicate(range.front(), value))
4706 {
4707 return true;
4708 }
4709 }
4710
4711 return false;
4712 }
4713
4714 };
4715
4716 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4717
4718 struct element_at_or_default_builder : base_builder
4719 {
4720 typedef element_at_or_default_builder this_type;
4721
4722 size_type index;
4723
4724 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD element_at_or_default_builder(size_type index) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4725 : index(std::move(index))
4726 {
4727 }
4728
4729 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD element_at_or_default_builder(element_at_or_default_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4730 : index(v.index)
4731 {
4732 }
4733
4734 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD element_at_or_default_builder(element_at_or_default_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4735 : index(std::move(v.index))
4736 {
4737 }
4738
4739
4740 template<typename TRange>
4741 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename TRange::value_type build(TRange range) const
4742 {
4743 size_type current = 0U;
4744
4745 while (range.next())
4746 {
4747 if (current < index)
4748 {
4749 ++current;
4750 }
4751 else
4752 {
4753 return range.front();
4754 }
4755 }
4756
4757 return typename TRange::value_type();
4758
4759 }
4760
4761 };
4762
4763 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4764
4765 template<typename TRange>
4766 struct pairwise_range : base_range
4767 {
4768 typedef pairwise_range<TRange> this_type;
4769 typedef TRange range_type;
4770
4771 typedef typename TRange::value_type element_type;
4772 typedef std::pair<element_type, element_type> value_type;
4773 typedef value_type return_type;
4774
4775 enum
4776 {
4777 returns_reference = 0,
4778 };
4779
4780
4781 range_type range;
4782 opt<element_type> previous;
4783 opt<element_type> current;
4784
4785 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_range(
4786 range_type range
4787 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4788 : range(std::move(range))
4789 {
4790 }
4791
4792 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_range(pairwise_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4793 : range(v.range)
4794 , previous(v.previous)
4795 , current(v.current)
4796 {
4797 }
4798
4799 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_range(pairwise_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4800 : range(std::move(v.range))
4801 , previous(std::move(v.previous))
4802 , current(std::move(v.current))
4803 {
4804 }
4805
4806 template<typename TPairwiseBuilder>
4807 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TPairwiseBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TPairwiseBuilder pairwise_builder) const
4808 {
4809 return pairwise_builder.build(*this);
4810 }
4811
4812 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
4813 {
4814 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(previous.has_value());
4815 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current.has_value());
4816 return std::make_pair(previous.get(), current.get());
4817 }
4818
4819 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
4820 {
4821 if (!previous.has_value())
4822 {
4823 if (range.next())
4824 {
4825 current = range.front();
4826 }
4827 else
4828 {
4829 return false;
4830 }
4831 }
4832
4833 previous.swap(current);
4834
4835 if (range.next())
4836 {
4837 current = range.front();
4838 return true;
4839 }
4840
4841 previous.clear();
4842 current.clear();
4843
4844 return false;
4845 }
4846 };
4847
4848 struct pairwise_builder : base_builder
4849 {
4850 typedef pairwise_builder this_type;
4851
4852 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_builder() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4853 {
4854 }
4855
4856 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_builder(pairwise_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4857 {
4858 }
4859
4860 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_builder(pairwise_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4861 {
4862 }
4863
4864 template<typename TRange>
4865 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD pairwise_range<TRange> build(TRange range) const
4866 {
4867 return pairwise_range<TRange>(std::move(range));
4868 }
4869 };
4870
4871 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4872
4873 template<typename TRange, typename TOtherRange>
4874 struct zip_with_range : base_range
4875 {
4876 typedef zip_with_range<TRange, TOtherRange> this_type;
4877 typedef TRange range_type;
4878 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
4879
4880 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TRange::value_type>::type left_element_type;
4881 typedef typename cleanup_type<typename TOtherRange::value_type>::type right_element_type;
4882 typedef std::pair<left_element_type, right_element_type> value_type;
4883 typedef value_type return_type;
4884 enum
4885 {
4886 returns_reference = 0,
4887 };
4888
4889 range_type range;
4890 other_range_type other_range;
4891
4892 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_range(
4893 range_type range
4894 , other_range_type other_range
4895 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4896 : range(std::move(range))
4897 , other_range(std::move(other_range))
4898 {
4899 }
4900
4901 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_range(zip_with_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4902 : range(v.range)
4903 , other_range(v.other_range)
4904 {
4905 }
4906
4907 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_range(zip_with_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4908 : range(std::move(v.range))
4909 , other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
4910 {
4911 }
4912
4913 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
4914 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
4915 {
4916 return range_builder.build(*this);
4917 }
4918
4919 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
4920 {
4921 return std::make_pair(range.front(), other_range.front());
4922 }
4923
4924 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next()
4925 {
4926 return range.next() && other_range.next();
4927 }
4928 };
4929
4930 template <typename TOtherRange>
4931 struct zip_with_builder : base_builder
4932 {
4933 typedef zip_with_builder<TOtherRange> this_type;
4934 typedef TOtherRange other_range_type;
4935
4936 other_range_type other_range;
4937
4938 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_builder(TOtherRange other_range) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4939 : other_range(std::move(other_range))
4940 {
4941 }
4942
4943 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_builder(zip_with_builder const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4944 : other_range(v.other_range)
4945 {
4946 }
4947
4948 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_builder(zip_with_builder&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4949 : other_range(std::move(v.other_range))
4950 {
4951 }
4952
4953 template <typename TRange>
4954 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD zip_with_range<TRange, TOtherRange> build(TRange range) const
4955 {
4956 return zip_with_range<TRange, TOtherRange>(std::move(range), std::move(other_range));
4957 }
4958 };
4959
4960 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
4961
4962 template<typename TPredicate>
4963 struct generate_range : base_range
4964 {
4965 static TPredicate get_predicate();
4966
4967 typedef decltype (get_predicate()()) raw_opt_value_type;
4968 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_opt_value_type>::type opt_value_type;
4969
4970 typedef decltype (*(get_predicate()())) raw_value_type;
4971 typedef typename cleanup_type<raw_value_type>::type value_type;
4972
4973 typedef generate_range<TPredicate> this_type;
4974 typedef TPredicate predicate_type;
4975 typedef value_type const& return_type;
4976
4977 enum
4978 {
4979 returns_reference = 1,
4980 };
4981
4982 TPredicate predicate;
4983 opt_value_type current_value;
4984
4985 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD generate_range(
4986 TPredicate predicate
4987 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4988 : predicate(std::move(predicate))
4989 {
4990 }
4991
4992 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD generate_range(generate_range const& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4993 : predicate(v.predicate)
4994 , current_value(v.current_value)
4995 {
4996 }
4997
4998 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD generate_range(generate_range&& v) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
4999 : predicate(std::move(v.predicate))
5000 , current_value(std::move(v.current_value))
5001 {
5002 }
5003
5004 template<typename TRangeBuilder>
5005 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD typename get_builtup_type<TRangeBuilder, this_type>::type operator>>(TRangeBuilder range_builder) const
5006 {
5007 return range_builder.build(*this);
5008 }
5009
5010 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD return_type front() const
5011 {
5012 CPPLINQ_ASSERT(current_value);
5013 return *current_value;
5014 }
5015
5016 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD bool next() CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5017 {
5018 current_value = predicate();
5019 return current_value;
5020 }
5021 };
5022
5023 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
5024
5025 } // namespace detail
5026
5027 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
5028 // The interface of cpplinq
5029 // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
5030
5031 // Range sources
5032
5033 template<typename TValueIterator>
5034 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::from_range<TValueIterator> from_iterators(
5035 TValueIterator begin
5036 , TValueIterator end
5037 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5038 {
5039 return detail::from_range<TValueIterator>(std::move(begin), std::move(end));
5040 }
5041
5042 template<typename TContainer>
5043 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::from_range<typename TContainer::const_iterator> from(
5044 TContainer const& container
5045 )
5046 {
5047 return detail::from_range<typename TContainer::const_iterator>(
5048 container.begin()
5049 , container.end()
5050 );
5051 }
5052
5053 template<typename TValueArray>
5054 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::from_range<typename detail::get_array_properties<TValueArray>::iterator_type> from_array(
5055 TValueArray& a
5056 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5057 {
5058 typedef detail::get_array_properties<TValueArray> array_properties;
5059 typedef typename array_properties::iterator_type iterator_type;
5060
5061 iterator_type begin = a;
5062 iterator_type end = begin + array_properties::size;
5063
5064 return detail::from_range<typename array_properties::iterator_type>(
5065 std::move(begin)
5066 , std::move(end)
5067 );
5068 }
5069
5070 template<typename TContainer>
5071 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::from_copy_range<typename detail::cleanup_type<TContainer>::type> from_copy(
5072 TContainer&& container
5073 )
5074 {
5075 typedef typename detail::cleanup_type<TContainer>::type container_type;
5076
5077 return detail::from_copy_range<container_type>(
5078 std::forward<TContainer>(container)
5079 );
5080 }
5081
5082 template<typename TPredicate>
5083 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::generate_range<TPredicate> generate(
5084 TPredicate predicate
5085 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5086 {
5087 return detail::generate_range<TPredicate>(std::move(predicate));
5088 }
5089

5116 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::select_many_builder<TPredicate> select_many(

5123 template<
5124 typename TOtherRange
5125 , typename TKeySelector
5126 , typename TOtherKeySelector
5127 , typename TCombiner
5128 >
5129 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::join_builder<
5130 TOtherRange
5131 , TKeySelector
5132 , TOtherKeySelector
5133 , TCombiner
5134 > join(
5135 TOtherRange other_range
5136 , TKeySelector key_selector
5137 , TOtherKeySelector other_key_selector
5138 , TCombiner combiner
5139 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5140 {
5141 return detail::join_builder<
5142 TOtherRange
5143 , TKeySelector
5144 , TOtherKeySelector
5145 , TCombiner
5146 >
5147 (
5148 std::move(other_range)
5149 , std::move(key_selector)
5150 , std::move(other_key_selector)
5151 , std::move(combiner)
5152 );
5153 }
5154

5360 // Generation operators
5361
5362 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::int_range range(
5363 int start
5364 , int count
5365 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5366 {
5367 auto c = count > 0 ? count : 0;
5368 auto end = (INT_MAX - c) > start ? (start + c) : INT_MAX;
5369 return detail::int_range(start, end);
5370 }
5371
5372 template <typename TValue>
5373 CPPLINQ_INLINEMETHOD detail::repeat_range<TValue> repeat(
5374 TValue element
5375 , int count
5376 ) CPPLINQ_NOEXCEPT
5377 {
5378 auto c = count > 0 ? count : 0;
5379 return detail::repeat_range<TValue>(element, c);
5380 }
